languages.text: "Я не стану сопротивляться. Все равно вернусь сюда через мгновение".
"I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."
languages.original_text: "Я не стану сопротивляться. Все равно вернусь сюда через мгновение".

traits.locale_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."
"I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."
"I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

languages.text: “我不会反抗的。反正过不了一会儿，我又会回到这里。”
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: “我不会反抗的。反正过不了一会儿，我又会回到这里。”

languages.text: « À quoi bon tenter de résister ? Je serai de retour pas plus tard que tout à l'heure, de toute façon. »
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: « À quoi bon tenter de résister ? Je serai de retour pas plus tard que tout à l'heure, de toute façon. »

languages.text: "Karşı koymaya tenezzül etmeyeceğim. Zaten birazdan buraya döneceğim."
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: "Karşı koymaya tenezzül etmeyeceğim. Zaten birazdan buraya döneceğim."

languages.text: «No pienso resistirme. Volveré aquí en un momento, de todas formas».
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: «No pienso resistirme. Volveré aquí en un momento, de todas formas».

languages.text: "Ich werde keinen Widerstand leisten. Ich bin ohnehin gleich wieder hier."
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde keinen Widerstand leisten. Ich bin ohnehin gleich wieder hier."

languages.text: 「抵抗しようとはしない。いずれにせよ、すぐにここに戻ってくる。」
languages.original_text: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."

traits.locale_text: 「抵抗しようとはしない。いずれにせよ、すぐにここに戻ってくる。」
